name: POC — Smaller Position Tiers Experiment
description: Same Rs 5L capital, same window, but position-size tiers reduced from 30k/50k/70k to 20k/35k/55k. Tests whether more concurrent positions at smaller sizes captures more signal alpha. Hypothesis: cash was acting as artificial scarcity filter; smaller positions = more trades = better deployment.
experiment_notes: Same Rs 5L capital as baseline POC
Tier sizes -28% / -30% / -21% smaller -> more concurrent positions possible
If win rate similar, cash filter was unnecessary scarcity
If win rate drops, original tiers were correctly filtering for quality
Brokerage Rs 20/order eats more % of smaller positions (Rs 20/20000 = 0.10% vs Rs 20/70000 = 0.029%)
